metadata.description: Agent skills marketplace for Claude Code and Codex

plugins.name: how-plugins-work
plugins.description: Reference for plugin naming, skill resolution, Claude/Codex adapter sync, marketplace aliases, runtime caches, and plugin:skill invocation.

plugins.name: self-improvement
plugins.description: Routes user feedback about agent behavior to the strongest durable target: hooks, skills, project code, or instruction files.

plugins.name: git-discipline
plugins.description: Git workflow skills, repo-aware push policy, and commit/push hooks for agent sessions and direct CLI commits.

plugins.name: intervision
plugins.description: Bring another coding agent in as a peer to review work just done or just discussed. Claude hands work to Codex; Codex hands work to Claude. Intervision is peer consultation among equals, not supervision from above.
